title: avenochloa breviaristata
intro: Avenochloa breviaristata, also known as  Avena breviaristata, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is a type of oat grass or wild oat, native to Europe. Avenochloa breviaristata has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in relieving stress and anxiety, and its health benefits include improving sleep quality and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
